zh.lifeSummary: 當John Adams於1555年1月1日出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛時，他的父親Henry Adams23歲，母親Rose Alice Stebbing19歲。他於1575年2月1日與Agnes Stone在英國薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭被列為tenant farmer。他去世於1604年3月19日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛享年49歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Adams于1555年1月1日出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛时，他的父亲Henry Adams23岁，母亲Rose Alice Stebbing19岁。他于1575年2月1日与Agnes Stone在英国薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他在英国英格兰被列为tenant farmer。他去世于1604年3月19日在英国英格兰薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛享年49岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛。

nameMeanings.name: Adams
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Dutch, and German (mainly northwestern Germany): patronymic from the personal name Adam . In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Greek Adamopoulos , Serbian and Croatian Adamović (see Adamovich ), Polish (and Jewish) Adamski .
Irish and Scottish: adopted for McAdam or a Scottish variant of Adam , with excrescent -s.

History: This surname was borne by two early presidents of the US, father and son. They were descended from Henry Adams, who settled in Braintree, MA, in 1635/6, from Barton St. David, Somerset, England. The younger of them, John Quincy Adams (1767–1848) derived his middle name from his maternal grandmother's surname (see   Quincy  ). — Another important New England family, established mainly in NH, is descended from William Adams, who emigrated from Shropshire, England, to Dedham, MA, in 1628. James Hopkins Adams (1812–61), governor of SC, was unconnected with either of these families, his ancestry being Welsh; his forebears entered North America through PA.

variants.name: Adam
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Pasquale, Adriano, Aldo, Amadeo, Amedeo, Antonio, Armando, Cristiano, Donato, Emilio, Erasmo, Eugenio, Gerado, Marco, Salvatore, Saverio.
Italian: patronymic from the personal name Adamo, an equivalent of Adam .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When John Adams was born on 1 January 1555, in Barton St David, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry Adams, was 23 and his mother, Rose Alice Stebbing, was 19. He married Agnes Stone on 1 February 1575, in Barton St David, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 4 daughters. His occupation is listed as tenant farmer in England, United Kingdom. He died on 19 March 1604, in Barton St David, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Barton St David, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Adams est né le 1 janvier 1555, à Barton St David, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Adams, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Rose Alice Stebbing, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Stone le 1 février 1575, à Barton St David, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est tenant farmer à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 19 mars 1604, à Barton St David, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Barton St David, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Adams am 1. Januar 1555 in Barton St David, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Adams 23 und seine Mutter Rose Alice Stebbing 19. Er hat am 1. Februar 1575 in Barton St David, Somerset, England Agnes Stone geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 4 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als tenant farmer in England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 19. März 1604 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Barton St David, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Barton St David, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Adams è nato il il 1 gennaio 1555 nel Barton St David, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry Adams, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Rose Alice Stebbing, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Stone il 1 febbraio 1575, nel Barton St David, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come tenant farmer nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 19 marzo 1604, nel Barton St David, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Barton St David, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Adamsが1555年1月1日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトバートン スト ダヴィドで生まれた時，父Henry Adamsは23歳，母Rose Alice Stebbingは19歳であった。1575年2月1日にイギリスソメルセトバートン スト ダヴィドでAgnes Stoneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリスでの職業はtenant farmerと記録されている。彼は1604年3月19日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトバートン スト ダヴィドで49歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトバートン スト ダヴィドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Adams(이)가 1555년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 바턴 스트 데이비드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Adams(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Rose Alice Stebbing(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1575년 2월 1일 영국 서머세트 바턴 스트 데이비드에서 Agnes Stone(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드에서 tenant farmer이었다. 그는 1604년 3월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 바턴 스트 데이비드에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 바턴 스트 데이비드에 묻혔다.

pt.1 January 1555–19 March 1604: 1 de janeiro de 1555–19 de março de 1604
pt.Barton St David, Somerset, England: Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Queen Camel, Somerset, , England: Queen Camel, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Adams nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1555, em Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Adams, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Rose Alice Stebbing, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Stone em 1 de fevereiro de 1575, em Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como tenant farmer em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 19 de março de 1604, em Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Adams родился 1 января 1555 г. в местности бартон ст дэвид, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry Adams было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Rose Alice Stebbing, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Stone 1 февраля 1575 г. в местности бартон ст дэвид, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери.  Он работал по профессии tenant farmer в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 19 марта 1604 г. в местности бартон ст дэвид, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности бартон ст дэвид, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Adams nació el 1 de enero de 1555, en Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry Adams, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Rose Alice Stebbing, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Agnes Stone el 1 de febrero de 1575, en Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era tenant farmer en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 19 de marzo de 1604, en Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra.
